meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact Power On Interio to discuss residential interiors, commercial offices, and turnkey execution.

hero.title: Tell us about your space.
hero.description: Share your project details, and we’ll recommend the right next step.

cards.serviceAreaHelp: We currently serve Bangalore, Chennai, and Hyderabad. For projects outside these cities, contact us and we’ll confirm availability.

form.helperText: Send your enquiry directly to our inbox and we’ll reply as soon as possible.

status.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. Your message has been sent to our team and we’ll get back to you soon.
status.errorMessage: We couldn’t send your enquiry just now. Please try again or email us directly.
